display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts visit Hampton Court Castle in Herefordshire, where items include an heirloom from the early days of photography.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team visits the Britannia Royal Naval College in Dartmouth, Devon, where items up for valuation include a relic from HMS Victory.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: A rare 1964 Ford Capri Consul coupe comes up for auction. Paul takes a 1957 Leyland Comet truck for a spin, and Dave admits that high on his wish-list is a Citroen 2CV.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek and Paul are off to Leeds on a rare father and son road trip to pick up a VW Cabriolet and a Lotus Elite.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: An epic timeline of WWII, as told by Laurence Olivier. After Hitler's initial territorial gains in Russia, his relentless advance was decisively stopped at Stalingrad.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: When the Nazis took Ksiaz Castle, it wasn't for the view. Secret staircases and lifts were built, while underneath, a vast network of tunnels was taking form.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts visit Hampton Court Castle in Herefordshire, where items include an heirloom from the early days of photography.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie Cumming navigates the scenic Oxford Canal onboard Naughty Lass, explores its twists and turns, and helps tow a stranded broken-down boater.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Dave is 'lost in France' en route to picking up a rare Honda NSX. Derek heads to a toy factory where some vintage motorbikes are stashed.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: As a teenager, all Dave wanted for his first car was a 2 litre Ghia Cortina, and today he's off to Nottinghamshire to collect just that, alongside a Mark 1 Capri.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: A rare 1964 Ford Capri Consul coupe comes up for auction. Paul takes a 1957 Leyland Comet truck for a spin, and Dave admits that high on his wish-list is a Citroen 2CV.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek and Paul are off to Leeds on a rare father and son road trip to pick up a VW Cabriolet and a Lotus Elite.

programme.title: Classic Car Garage
programme.desc: A 289 AC Cobra comes into the garage with an intermittent indicator issue but has the team scratching their heads about the provenance of the car.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole restores a petrol pump and turns a hubcap into a clock, and Simon O'Brien repurposes a copper immersion heater into a stylish wash basin.

programme.title: Martin Clunes: Islands of America
programme.desc: Martin visits Puerto Rico, recovering from Hurricane Maria's devastation. He explores Georgia and Carolina's Sea Islands, home to the Gullah Geechee people preserving African heritage.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Martin Clunes: Islands of Australia
programme.desc: Actor Martin Clunes explores Lord Howe Island, Norfolk Island and Restoration Island.

programme.title: Martin Clunes: Islands of Australia
programme.desc: Martin Clunes travels to the Tiwi Islands, swims with a whale shark, visits the Houtman Abrolhos, and samples life on Rottnest Island.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek casts his eye over a Citroen 2CV, before he is off admiring the treasure trove of more than 270 motorbikes in the same garage.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek heads off to collect some vintage motorcycles from a garage at the bottom of the garden in the North-East of England.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: The definitive guide to World War II, narrated by the late, great Laurence Olivier. Hear how German U-boats caused havoc among Allied merchant shipping in the Atlantic.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: Built in 1934, Ordensburg Vogelsang, a virtual Nazi Castle was constructed with the intention of building the New German; elite future leaders of the Reich.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team values more rarities at the Britannia Royal Naval College in Dartmouth, Devon, including the personal effects of a Nobel Peace Prize winner.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team visit Victoria Hall in Saltaire, West Yorkshire, where items up for valuation include a doodle by LS Lowry.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: A beautiful looking sports car has been fooling the punters and intriguing Derek. It's a Challenger E-Type - a fibreglass replica created from an E-Type mould.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Paul and Jack head to Staffordshire to pick up five vehicles from collector Rob's colossal barn, including a Mini and a Morris Minor.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: The definitive guide to World War II, narrated by the late, great Laurence Olivier. Hear how German U-boats caused havoc among Allied merchant shipping in the Atlantic.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: Built in 1934, Ordensburg Vogelsang, a virtual Nazi Castle was constructed with the intention of building the New German; elite future leaders of the Reich.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team values more rarities at the Britannia Royal Naval College in Dartmouth, Devon, including the personal effects of a Nobel Peace Prize winner.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie navigates the Oxford Canal, bumps into a hire boat and a hedge and tackles large river locks on the scenic Upper River Thames.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie Cumming journeys from Shardlow to Etruria Junction, Stoke on Trent, exploring the Trent and Mersey Canal.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie Cumming explores the English canal network. A low canal tunnel in Staffordshire proves to be problematic and Robbie helps out a stranded boater.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie Cumming continues across the Pennines from Marple to Huddersfield, where his journey is hampered by a fallen tree and a leaking lock pound.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie Cumming concludes his journey by travelling from Barton Swing Aqueduct to Liverpool Docks - but experiences engine problems on the way.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: A beautiful looking sports car has been fooling the punters and intriguing Derek. It's a Challenger E-Type - a fibreglass replica created from an E-Type mould.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Paul and Jack head to Staffordshire to pick up five vehicles from collector Rob's colossal barn, including a Mini and a Morris Minor.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: After years of pursuit and a countless number of murders, Langston comes face to face with serial killer Nate Haskell inside the house where his killing spree began. S11 E22

programme.title: Killer Couples
programme.desc: A Las Vegas red haired siren and her millionaire boyfriend become suspects in a murder, hundreds of miles away. S8 E4

programme.title: New Amsterdam
programme.desc: Max and Wilder face a dilemma over approvals for a revolutionary cancer drug as Max learns a secret about his own bout with cancer. S5 E12

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Damages
programme.desc: With Patty going after those who killed Daniel Purcell's wife, Ellen works with the FBI to lure Tom into making an illegal payment to a plaintiff in order to ultimately bring down their boss. S2 E2

programme.title: Superstore
programme.desc: A unique family of employees at a super-sized megastore hilariously tackle the day-to-day grind of rabid bargain hunters, riot-causing sales, and nap-worthy training sessions.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: LES MILLS Born To Move
programme.desc: Designed to nurture a life-long love of physical activity, BORN TO MOVE helps children experience the joy and vitality of moving to music, combining fun and fitness in way that children love.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Kiri and Lou follows the adventures of Kiri, a feisty little dinosaur with overpowering emotions, and Lou, a gentle but thoughtful creature. Follow the friendship of these two prehistoric creatures.

programme.title: Toi Time
programme.desc: Toi Time is back for Season 4 with more laughter and learning. Join Aunty Anika, Māia, Jojo, Riki, and Buzz as they explore the world around them.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Join this merry band of Smurfs on their many magical adventures as they try to outsmart the wicked sorcerer Gargamel and his cat Azrael.

programme.title: Scooby Doo And Guess Who?
programme.desc: The Mystery Inc. gage solve mysteries alongside a new celebrity guest star each episode.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Robin, Cyborg, Starfire, Raven and Beast Boy are superheroes and roommates who love to save the day. But what happens when they're not fighting crime?

programme.title: Darwin And Newts
programme.desc: Darwin & Newts are a brother and sister duo who love adventures and figuring out how stuff works! Join them as they explore and discover new things, with the help of science and some Kiwi ingenuity.

programme.title: Tākaro Tribe
programme.desc: Come join the Tākaro Tribe! They sing and dance their way through their magical alphabet forest, meeting friends and whānau and learning as they go.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Les Mills Adult Classes
programme.desc: Les Mills and TVNZ are thrilled to be working together to offer you free access to renowned Les Mills classes; BODYBALANCE, BODYCOMBAT, BODYATTACK, LES MILLS CORE and LES MILLS GRIT Cardio.

programme.title: Everyday Gourmet With Justine Schofield
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia finalist Justine Schofield shares some of her favourite recipes in this cookery program aimed at ideas for the home cook.

programme.title: Farm To Fork
programme.desc: Farm to Fork takes you on a journey across Australia, showcasing fresh local produce to inspire healthy cooking. Discover where your food comes from, support local farmers, and learn how to eat well.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Driven by humour and optimism, Drew Barrymore presents human interest stories and has heartfelt conversations with special guests.

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Lacey lashes out. Richie feels the weight of his actions. Cash takes the high road.

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping Point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: Bridge Of Lies
programme.desc: The high-stakes quiz tasks teams with navigating a bridge of truths while avoiding lies to win cash prizes for charity.

programme.title: Everyday Gourmet With Justine Schofield
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia finalist Justine Schofield shares some of her favourite recipes in this cookery program aimed at ideas for the home cook.

programme.title: Travel Guides
programme.desc: The Travel Guides go west, heading for the Kimberley in far north Western Australia. This will be the most remote holiday they've ever had!

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: In this Treehouse Of Horror episode, Transformer-like robots duke it out in Springfield and Homer kills off celebrities so their likenesses can be exploited. S20 E4

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: After spending the holidays apart, the gang get together to hear about Sheldon's and Amy's terrible trip to Texas and Howard's and Bernadette's first days as parents. S10 E12

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: When a Hollywood producer scouts Woodstone for filming, Sam takes a creative risk with the ghosts' support. S5 E20

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: A self-confessed marijuana user crashes his motorbike into the back of a car in busy Melbourne.

programme.title: Cinderella
programme.desc: When her father dies, Ella finds herself at the mercy of her cruel stepmother. Ella's fortunes change after meeting a dashing stranger. Stars Lily James, Cate Blanchett, and Richard Madden. (2015)

programme.title: Never Mind The Buzzcocks
programme.desc: Kiell Smith-Bynoe, Danny Goffey and Freya Ridings join the regulars for the legendary pop culture panel show's revival, hosted by Greg Davies.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The team's ability to work together is put to the test when they are challenged to make Chinese dishes in a tag-team fashion.

programme.title: Stumble
programme.desc: Courteney must cut one of her Buttons from making mat at Daytona. Each of the team shares why Daytona is so important, but Courteney operates with her head over her heart. S1 E12

programme.title: Gladiators UK
programme.desc: In the first of the semi-finals, four determined Contenders face the mighty Gladiators before taking on the gruelling Eliminator as they battle for a place in the grand final.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: The Hundred With Andy Lee
programme.desc: Host Andy Lee is joined in the studio by a panel of Australia's funniest comedians and a 100 regular Aussies via Zoom to explore the fun behind the facts that make us tick.

programme.title: The Voice Australia
programme.desc: On the first night of the battle rounds, 16 contestants sing their hearts out to secure their spot in the competition.

programme.title: Mecha Builders
programme.desc: Elmo, Cookie Monster, and Abby Cadabby are robot heroes-in-training who use their STEM superpowers to solve wacky larger-than-life problems.

programme.title: Tākaro Tribe
programme.desc: Come join the Tākaro Tribe! They sing and dance their way through their magical alphabet forest, meeting friends and whānau and learning as they go.

programme.title: Maddie + Triggs
programme.desc: Maddie, an adventurous youngster who happens to be visually impaired, sets out with her best doggy friend Triggs to discover the music and adventure in the sounds of the world around them.

programme.title: Robin Hood: Mischief In Sherwood
programme.desc: Sherwood is in danger from the tyrannical Prince John! Teenage Robin and his merry band of outlaws fight back.

programme.title: Smarty Pants
programme.desc: Tired of being the "losers" in class, three buddies are on a mission to become cool - realising along the way that just accepting themselves is the coolest way to be.

programme.title: Ninjago Masters Of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When two evil brothers manipulate the past and future to control all of Ninjago, the ninjas must retrieve the lost time blades to stop them.

programme.title: Beyblade X
programme.desc: Four beybladers and their genius friend travel the world as team 'Bladebreakers' to win a championship, realising there's much more at stake on the go.

programme.title: Transformers: Earthspark
programme.desc: After the end of the Transformers' war, the Malto family moves to Witwicky, Pennsylvania, to start a new life but their lives soon get entangled with a group of Terran Transformers.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran gets the lead role in an off-Broadway production of 'Romeo and Juliet'. S2 E7

programme.title: Fresh
programme.desc: We're inside the MMA gym in Fresh Outta Water, while Fijian-Niuean artist Vitinia shares why she’s Young, Gifted & Brown. Plus, a fashion capsule drop and D for Diaspora makes a Kiki Fulufukamoa.

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Cody keeps his distance.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: Hitler's Island Madness: Uncovering hidden structures built by the Nazis. The first edition focuses on Guernsey, which Hitler occupied and fortified over the course of five years.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: A D-Day Coverup?: A mile-and-a half of recently-excavated trenches, bunkers, barracks, and gun encasements near Pointe du Hoc, which tell a new story of D-Day.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Discover how the superpowers established a new political order at the end of World War II. Laurence Olivier's narration and interviews with statesmen paint a vivid picture.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Laurence Olivier narrates the iconic, 26-part documentary series about World War II. As peace descends in 1945, the series ends with a sombre reminder of the human cost.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: Hitler's Island Madness: Uncovering hidden structures built by the Nazis. The first edition focuses on Guernsey, which Hitler occupied and fortified over the course of five years.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: A D-Day Coverup?: A mile-and-a half of recently-excavated trenches, bunkers, barracks, and gun encasements near Pointe du Hoc, which tell a new story of D-Day.

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Mark Goodier and Anthea Turner present a special Christmas episode featuring Kim Applebee, The Beautiful South and Elton John.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Discover how the superpowers established a new political order at the end of World War II. Laurence Olivier's narration and interviews with statesmen paint a vivid picture.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Laurence Olivier narrates the iconic, 26-part documentary series about World War II. As peace descends in 1945, the series ends with a sombre reminder of the human cost.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: Hitler's Island Madness: Uncovering hidden structures built by the Nazis. The first edition focuses on Guernsey, which Hitler occupied and fortified over the course of five years.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: A D-Day Coverup?: A mile-and-a half of recently-excavated trenches, bunkers, barracks, and gun encasements near Pointe du Hoc, which tell a new story of D-Day.

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Mark Goodier and Anthea Turner present a special Christmas episode featuring Kim Applebee, The Beautiful South and Elton John.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Discover how the superpowers established a new political order at the end of World War II. Laurence Olivier's narration and interviews with statesmen paint a vivid picture.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Laurence Olivier narrates the iconic, 26-part documentary series about World War II. As peace descends in 1945, the series ends with a sombre reminder of the human cost.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: Hitler's Island Madness: Uncovering hidden structures built by the Nazis. The first edition focuses on Guernsey, which Hitler occupied and fortified over the course of five years.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: A D-Day Coverup?: A mile-and-a half of recently-excavated trenches, bunkers, barracks, and gun encasements near Pointe du Hoc, which tell a new story of D-Day.

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Mark Goodier and Anthea Turner present a special Christmas episode featuring Kim Applebee, The Beautiful South and Elton John.

programme.title: Villages By The Sea
programme.desc: Ben Robinson visits the Norfolk village of Cley next the Sea and finds due to Dutch settlers in the Elizabethan era, it's not as 'next the sea' as it once was.

programme.title: Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough shines the spotlight on nature's most amazing animals. This episode looks at the significance of large eyes in owls and giant squid.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Indian Ocean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon travels around the coastline of the Indian Ocean, setting out from South Africa - where he dives with sharks - and moving on to Mozambique and Zanzibar.

programme.title: Indian Ocean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon's journey takes him spearfishing in Madagascar, through the slums of Mauritius and on to the Seychelles, where he visits the world's smallest national park.

programme.title: Indian Ocean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: The adventurer travels from the south of Kenya to the Horn of Africa, along the way joining a Ugandan peace-keeping force in Mogadishu, the capital of war-torn Somalia.

programme.title: Indian Ocean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon journeys from Oman to the Maldives, where the tropical coral islands are being damaged by bleaching and an entire island has been manufactured as a landfill dump.

programme.title: Indian Ocean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon travels around the coastline of the Indian Ocean, setting out from South Africa - where he dives with sharks - and moving on to Mozambique and Zanzibar.

programme.title: Indian Ocean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon's journey takes him spearfishing in Madagascar, through the slums of Mauritius and on to the Seychelles, where he visits the world's smallest national park.

programme.title: Indian Ocean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: The adventurer travels from the south of Kenya to the Horn of Africa, along the way joining a Ugandan peace-keeping force in Mogadishu, the capital of war-torn Somalia.

programme.title: Indian Ocean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon journeys from Oman to the Maldives, where the tropical coral islands are being damaged by bleaching and an entire island has been manufactured as a landfill dump.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Jonathon Morris stars as sensitive soul Adrian in Carla Lane's sitcom. Lilo Lil confronts the family when Dad decides to come home. Nellie says goodbye to her new man friend.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Cheeky Liverpool comedy and some shocking 1980s hairstyles in Carla Lane's sitcom about a family of loveable rogues. It's the day of Aveline and Oswald's wedding.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Adrian accidentally becomes a hero, Billy is troubled by his impending divorce, Aveline is preoccupied with pregnancy, and Joey is in real trouble.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Carla Lane's sitcom about a family of loveable Liverpudlian rogues. Billy's divorce, Aveline's desire to get pregnant and Joey's tax troubles are overshadowed by Jack's return home.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: More Liverpudlian japes in Carla Lane's family sitcom. Adrian's in love, Jack's back buying and selling, and Aveline's all-out efforts to become pregnant continue.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Carla Lane's 1980s sitcom revolving around a family of loveable Liverpudlian rogues. The recovery of a stolen piano causes repercussions in the Boswell house.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Jonathon Morris stars as sensitive soul Adrian in Carla Lane's sitcom. Lilo Lil confronts the family when Dad decides to come home. Nellie says goodbye to her new man friend.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Cheeky Liverpool comedy and some shocking 1980s hairstyles in Carla Lane's sitcom about a family of loveable rogues. It's the day of Aveline and Oswald's wedding.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Adrian accidentally becomes a hero, Billy is troubled by his impending divorce, Aveline is preoccupied with pregnancy, and Joey is in real trouble.

programme.title: Unbreakable
programme.desc: It’s showtime for Ari, Fi gets back on the board and Neelam sets her sights on her Paralympic dream. S3 E5

programme.title: First Crossings
programme.desc: Follow two modern day Kiwi adventurers Kevin Biggar and Jaime Fitzgerald as they recreate the journeys of our early pioneer explorers.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: BNZ Business Breakfast
programme.desc: Join BNZ Business Breakfast for a sharp, authoritative start to the business day. In just 30 minutes we set the agenda — fast, focused, and forward-looking.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Start your day off right as the Breakfast team brings you all the latest in news, weather, sport and entertainment.

programme.title: The Finish Line
programme.desc: The more you know, the further you go. Knowledge equals speed as contestants battle it out to reach the finish line first. Action-packed quiz fun with Roman Kemp and Sarah Greene.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing!

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Gameshow hosted by Warwick Davis. Five contestants attempt to answer top 10 list questions for the chance to win a big cash prize. The more top ten lists, the greater the jackpot.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street.

programme.title: Go Girls
programme.desc: Ted finally gets his wish, as Alice gets the speed wobbles - and Levi makes the ultimate sacrifice. S5 E12

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Australia
programme.desc: Join host Grant Denyer for a round of this high pressure and high stakes game show, where contestants face up to the Banker and must decide: is it deal or no deal?

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing! Hosted by Bradley Walsh.

programme.title: 1News at Six
programme.desc: The nation's leading team of journalists brings viewers the latest news and sport, plus the most comprehensive weather report.

programme.title: Seven Sharp
programme.desc: Join Hilary Barry, Jeremy Wells and the team for a fresh perspective on today's stories.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Nestled deep in the British countryside, The Repair Shop is a place where battered, broken but beloved artefacts are brought back to life.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: At Château de Cézérac, Jon and Carmen are transforming a smoked damaged kitchen into a dining room, while Paul and Debbie are taking on their largest ever renovation.

programme.title: Impossible Builds
programme.desc: In Monmouthshire’s hills, Jamie Feilden’s 60-acre farm doubles as a charity for urban youth. He plans two prefabricated elliptical cabins on a remote slope.

programme.title: Mrs Brown's Boys
programme.desc: Agnes goes on a diet after her family comments about her weight, but soon realises how difficult it will be to lay off the fish and chips.

programme.title: Amazing Hotels: Life Beyond The Lobby
programme.desc: Rob Rinder and Monica Galetti work at high altitude, 3000 metres above sea-level at a hidden gem of a hotel with Buddhist connections in the remote kingdom of Bhutan.

programme.title: 800 Words
programme.desc: George struggles against the tide of Terry-mania sweeping Weld. The town prepares to open its first fine dining restaurant, but not everyone is invited. S2 E14

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Fishing and Adventure
programme.desc: The boys head to the Far North of New Zealand where their challenge is set to land their personal best snapper and crayfish. The boys have their hands full with some inshore monsters.

programme.title: Rural Delivery
programme.desc: The search for high quality low alcohol Pinot Noir by a Central Otago grower and contractor; Research into managing avian botulism outbreaks; and Benefits of self-shedding sheep for pastoral farmers.

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: In Safe Hands: A Southland woman shares stories of mental resilience and farm safety through workshops and children’s books, inspired by the couple’s life on their sheep and beef station.

programme.title: Dog Squad Puppy School
programme.desc: Police pup Tahi hits the beach in Gisborne, find out how the Biosecurity ‘O’ Litter are stepping up? And meet eco warrior Marty who’s training to detect Kauri dieback. S4 E9

programme.title: Tagata Pasifika
programme.desc: Tagata Pasifika is TVNZ's flagship Pacific news show, telling the stories of Pacific Islanders and its community. Made with the support of NZ on Air.

programme.title: Find My Country House Canada
programme.desc: Couples looking to relocate from the city find their perfect country house in a regional, Canadian location.

programme.title: John & Lisa's Weekend Kitchen
programme.desc: John and Lisa delight us with a festive season table menu that includes a chicken vol au vent that the whole family will want and a festive chocolate Black Forest cake.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Australia
programme.desc: Rick Stein explores the Central Coast on Sydney's northern fringes, meeting chefs, foragers and producers, who reveal how the outdoors shapes their approach to food.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Rex's starring role in a television commercial is interrupted by the murder of one of the agency's ad executives.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Personal and professional matters collide for Carrie and Al when they pose as husband and wife in a ruse to trap a serial killer targeting wealthy couples.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A passenger is stabbed on the bus to Honore, but when everyone else claims to have remained in their seats and seen nothing, Jack and his team are baffled.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Yannick Bisson stars in the mystery series set in 19th century Toronto. The disappearance of a boy sets Murdoch on the trail of spies and a robotic super weapon.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The Victorian mystery series about a Canadian forensics pioneer. In a fever, Murdoch begins to suspect that his landlady may have a murder on her mind.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: While on a mission to protect the mayor during a rally about immigration rights, Patrick discovers a suspect for a crime that has yet to be committed.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Rex's starring role in a television commercial is interrupted by the murder of one of the agency's ad executives.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The clerical sleuth must delve into the past and open up old wounds when a child killer is found murdered.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Personal and professional matters collide for Carrie and Al when they pose as husband and wife in a ruse to trap a serial killer targeting wealthy couples.

programme.title: Saint-Pierre
programme.desc: Arch and Fitz investigate Fitz's enemy, Premier O'Brien, when he becomes the prime suspect in a bachelor party gone wrong.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A passenger is stabbed on the bus to Honore, but when everyone else claims to have remained in their seats and seen nothing, Jack and his team are baffled.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mark Williams stars as the crime-solving priest, who this time sets out to protect an old friend by investigating a 300-year-old secret hidden in a university.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The clerical sleuth must delve into the past and open up old wounds when a child killer is found murdered.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A passenger is stabbed on the bus to Honore, but when everyone else claims to have remained in their seats and seen nothing, Jack and his team are baffled.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Rex's starring role in a television commercial is interrupted by the murder of one of the agency's ad executives.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Yannick Bisson stars as the forensics pioneer in the mystery series set in 19th-century Toronto. Murdoch and Dr Ogden have a difference of opinion.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Yannick Bisson stars as the forensics pioneer in the mesmerising mystery series. Murdoch investigates the murder of a university professor.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: com: Yannick Bisson stars in the mystery set in 19th century Toronto. The discovery of a decomposed body leads Murdoch to the fascinating world of telegraphy.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Yannick Bisson is the detective pioneer solving mysteries in 19th century Toronto. Murdoch's probing of a death leads to Toronto's Jewish ghetto.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: When a troubled soul from the past returns, the priest must investigate the new chapter of the Church of Apollo.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: The team investigates the death of a girl on an island and discovers the victim was an orphan who had been conducting inquiries into her father's murder.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: After the owner of a construction company is found dead, Charlie and Rex track the killer to an underground casino. Major Crimes goes undercover to solve the case.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Crime drama series. A terrorist traps Eliot and the mayor in a lift, threatening to send them to their death. Carrie must race against time to save them.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Jack is on the case when a zoo owner is killed by a tranquilliser dart in an empty park - with the only possible culprits in the staff area when the shot was fired.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: com: Yannick Bisson stars in the mystery set in 19th century Toronto. The discovery of a decomposed body leads Murdoch to the fascinating world of telegraphy.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Yannick Bisson is the detective pioneer solving mysteries in 19th century Toronto. Murdoch's probing of a death leads to Toronto's Jewish ghetto.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: The team investigates the death of a girl on an island and discovers the victim was an orphan who had been conducting inquiries into her father's murder.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: After the owner of a construction company is found dead, Charlie and Rex track the killer to an underground casino. Major Crimes goes undercover to solve the case.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: When a troubled soul from the past returns, the priest must investigate the new chapter of the Church of Apollo.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Crime drama series. A terrorist traps Eliot and the mayor in a lift, threatening to send them to their death. Carrie must race against time to save them.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Jack is on the case when a zoo owner is killed by a tranquilliser dart in an empty park - with the only possible culprits in the staff area when the shot was fired.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A man confesses to murdering his boss despite being unable to remember what happened, but Neville is convinced that things are not as simple as they seem.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The priest has his work cut out thanks to Sid, who is released from prison, but then accused of murdering his former defence barrister in a ghastly manner.
